description:
Goal:
Turn hard brokers into useful user-guided checklists instead of unsafe automation.

Scope:
- manual_only adapter output
- prefilled instructions
- user action checklist
- re-scan reminder

Candidates:
- PeopleConnect family
- BeenVerified

Acceptance:
- Generates clear manual instructions.
- Does not claim automation.
- Does not collect SSN.
- Personal inbox verification is handled by the user.
title: Guided-manual flow generator
